title: poa exilis
intro: Poa exilis, also known as the meadow grass or grass-leaved poa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa exilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Poa exilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some herbal remedies for its purported benefits.
